Good Morning All!

Treating myself to a half hour on X as a reward for making some progress on the training course presentations.

Still have a work-related query though.  What AI Graphics assistant can turn these rather dated slides into something a bit fresher (while maintaining the same amount of information)?  Do you think Canva is the one to try?

Have a great (what's left of) Thursday!
